info.name: VerveguardAPI
info.description: Full integration test coverage for VerveguardAPI. Use the Login requests to auto-populate {{accessToken}} and {{refreshToken}}.

exec: pm.test('account not accessible', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().errorMessage).to.eql('Account is not accessible'));
